methodology: Pinned pre-extracted factor table for control-plane use. Medians are derived from official NREL-published operational and comparative water-use ranges and kept explicit so routing does not depend on live document parsing.

notes: Operational renewable benchmark used for low-water generation profiles.
Operational photovoltaic benchmark used for low-water generation profiles.
Natural gas combined-cycle closed-loop cooling median derived from official NREL comparison ranges.
Closed-loop coal benchmark derived from official NREL comparison ranges.
Closed-loop nuclear benchmark derived from official NREL comparison ranges.
